title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Boosts Clientele With F&M Bank Partnership
text: Jack Henry's (JKHY) partnership with Farmers and Merchants Bank gets extended. The latter strives to bring efficiency to its operations with the former's robust solutions.

title: Farmers and Merchants Bank Expands Collaboration with Jack Henry to Support the Future of Local Community Banking
text: Bank leverages Jack Henry security, operational efficiencies and open banking infrastructure to support growing retail and commercial accounts MONETT, Mo. , March 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry™ (Nasdaq: JKHY) announced today that it is expanding its existing partnership with longtime client Farmers & Merchants Bank (F&M Bank), a $1.25-billion asset community bank based in Virginia.

title: Jack Henry Recognized for Lending Innovation in FinTech Breakthrough Awards Program
text: Annual Awards Program Honors Outstanding Financial Technology Products & Companies MONETT, Mo. , March 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry™ (Nasdaq: JKHY), today announced that its LoanVantage solution has been selected as winner of the "Best Loan Origination Platform" award in the 7th annual FinTech Breakthrough Awards program.

title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Boosts Banking Automation With SMA Partnership
text: Jack Henry (JKHY) partners with SMA to enhance operational efficiencies for credit unions and banks.

title: SMA Technologies and Jack Henry Collaborate to Improve Operational Efficiencies for Banks & Credit Unions
text: HOUSTON , March 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- SMA Technologies , a leading provider of automation solutions for financial services and the maker of OpCon Workload Automation & Orchestration, today announced an expansion of its relationship with Jack Henry™ to include banks after successfully scaling digital business transformation with OpCon for Jack Henry's credit union clients. SMA Technologies will help banks using Jack Henry's SilverLake data center to automate and orchestrate workflows with other applications, data, and processes the institutions manage on-premises.

title: Why Is Jack Henry (JKHY) Down 0.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Jack Henry (JKHY) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Dividend Growth Stock Watchlist - March 2023
text: There are 18 stocks on my dividend growth watchlist for March 2023. More than half of the stocks on my watchlist for this month are currently undervalued based on dividend yield theory.

title: 32 Upcoming Dividend Increases Including 2 Dividend Kings
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 8.3% and a median increase of 8.1%.
